metadata.title: FitMetrics — Free Health & Body Calculators
metadata.description: Calculate BMI, BMR, Ideal Body Weight, Body Fat %, and TDEE using established formulas. Free, accurate, and easy to use.

hero.title: Know Your Body.
hero.subtitle: FitMetrics gives you essential health calculators built on established formulas used by doctors, dietitians, and fitness professionals worldwide.

calculatorsSection.title: Choose a Calculator
calculatorsSection.subtitle: Select any calculator to get your result instantly

benefitsSection.title: Why Use FitMetrics?
benefitsSection.subtitle: Built for accuracy, simplicity, and your privacy

items.title: Established Formulas
items.desc: Every calculator uses well-known formulas widely applied in clinical and fitness practice.

items.title: Instant Results
items.desc: Get your health metrics in seconds with no sign-up or download required.

items.title: Track Progress
items.desc: Save your results and monitor how your metrics change over time.

items.title: Private & Secure
items.desc: Your data stays on your device. We never sell or share personal information.

disclaimer.title: Medical Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The calculators on FitMetrics are for informational and educational purposes only. Results are estimates based on population averages and standard clinical formulas. They do not constitute medical advice and should not replace consultation with a qualified healthcare professional. Always consult a doctor, dietitian, or certified fitness professional before making changes to your diet, exercise routine, or health regimen.
